purpose: Establish ground truth for menu module (DB schema, seed data, API surface, test infrastructure) before api-plan and e2e-plan phases.

fields.name: str
fields.parent_id: int (default 0; 0 means root, no FK constraint to menu.id)
fields.component: str (Layout for catalogs, view path for menus)

model.fk_consequence: Database does NOT enforce parent_id referential integrity or cycle prevention. Application-level guard is required and currently MISSING (see anomalies).

list.behavior: Recursively builds tree from parent_id=0 outward, ordering siblings by `order` ASC.
list.response_200: {code: 200, msg: "OK", data: [tree], total: int, page: int, page_size: int}
list.RECURSION_RISK: get_menu_with_children() recurses without depth limit or visited-set. If parent_id forms a cycle, this endpoint will infinite-loop or RecursionError.

update.BUG_SURFACE: No validation that parent_id != id (self-parent) and no check that parent_id is not a descendant of id (cycle). Backend will accept and persist a circular relationship; subsequent /list will hang.

delete.response_400_business: {code: 4000, msg: "Cannot delete a menu with child menus"} — note: returned via Fail() helper which uses business code, NOT HTTP 400; HTTP status is still 200.

MenuCreate.name: str (required, no length validator in Pydantic)
MenuCreate.order: int (optional, no default in schema but example=1)

MenuUpdate.all_other_fields: Optional (any subset can be sent; existing values preserved if omitted by controller's update semantics)
MenuUpdate.note: Controller uses CRUDBase.update which sets all provided fields via update_from_dict(...). No special validation.

controller.validation_logic_location: NONE — endpoint and controller both lack parent_id sanity checks

auth.note: Auth header is literally `token`, NOT `Authorization: Bearer`. Confirmed via app/core/dependency.py.

seed_data.trigger: init_data() at app startup; runs ONLY when Menu table is empty
seed_data.guarantees: On first run, populates a deterministic menu tree. After any test mutation, seed will NOT re-run.
seed_data.seed_id_stability: IDs are auto-assigned; absolute IDs MUST NOT be hard-coded in tests. Tests must look up by name or path.
test_invariants_safe_to_assume: A menu named '系统管理' with parent_id=0 exists
A menu named '一级菜单' with parent_id=0 exists
The 系统管理 catalog has at least 6 children menus
All seed menus use known names: 用户管理, 角色管理, 菜单管理, API管理, 部门管理, 审计日志, 一级菜单, 系统管理
test_must_avoid: Deleting seed menus (would break role bindings and login)
Asserting on a fixed total count (other QA changes may have added test menus)

MISSING_FOR_THIS_CHANGE: tests/api/helpers/menu_api.py — DOES NOT EXIST (data-knowledge.yaml line 126 claims it does; that claim is FALSE)
menu fixture (e.g., seeded_menu / top_level_menu_factory / menu_with_children_factory) — DOES NOT EXIST in tests/api/conftest.py
tests/e2e/scripts/menu_data_setup.py — DOES NOT EXIST (data-knowledge.yaml line 144 claims it does; that claim is FALSE)
cleanup_menus fixture — DOES NOT EXIST in tests/e2e/conftest.py (data-knowledge.yaml line 64 claims it does; that claim is FALSE)
menu_management_page fixture (similar to user_list_page) — DOES NOT EXIST

menu_management_page.sidebar_nav: 系统管理 → 菜单管理

to_be_inspected_during_e2e_planning: exact button text (新建菜单 / 添加 / etc.)
form labels for parent menu selection
error toast message format on rejected operations

anomalies.title: .aws/data-knowledge.yaml claims menu test infrastructure exists, but it does not
false_claims: .aws/data-knowledge.yaml:64 — fixture cleanup_menus declared in tests/e2e/conftest.py — NOT PRESENT
.aws/data-knowledge.yaml:126 — helper safe_delete_menu in tests/api/helpers/menu_api.py — FILE DOES NOT EXIST
.aws/data-knowledge.yaml:143-146 — script tests/e2e/scripts/menu_data_setup.py with delete_menu — FILE DOES NOT EXIST
anomalies.impact: api-codegen and e2e-codegen would assume helpers exist and import them, causing import-time test collection failure.
resolution_required_before_codegen: Before api-codegen: create tests/api/helpers/menu_api.py with create_menu, get_menu, list_menus, update_menu, delete_menu, safe_delete_menu, find_menu_by_name helpers
Before api-codegen: add menu fixtures to tests/api/conftest.py (e.g., top_level_menu_factory, child_menu_factory, menu_with_children_factory) with auto-cleanup
Before e2e-codegen: create tests/e2e/scripts/menu_data_setup.py with create_menu, delete_menu, find_menu_by_name (via API)
Before e2e-codegen: add cleanup_menus fixture and (optionally) menu_management_page fixture to tests/e2e/conftest.py
Update .aws/data-knowledge.yaml to reflect actual menu helper status (move from to-be-created -> actual once written, or downgrade confidence to low)
anomalies.codegen_gate_decision: BLOCK codegen until missing helpers/fixtures exist. The plan phases (api-plan, e2e-plan) MAY proceed and SHOULD include explicit prerequisites listing these missing artifacts.

anomalies.title: Menu /update endpoint accepts arbitrary parent_id with no cycle/self-parent guard; /list will infinite-recurse on cycle
evidence: app/api/v1/menus/menus.py:47-52 — update_menu has no parent_id validation
app/api/v1/menus/menus.py:14-28 — get_menu_with_children recurses purely on parent_id without visited-set
app/controllers/menu.py:1-16 — controller has NO parent_id sanity check
app/models/admin.py — Menu.parent_id has NO FK and NO unique constraint
anomalies.test_coverage: Covered by TC-MENU-008 in case.yaml. This case is expected to FAIL during execution and be classified as a product issue per workflow contract (recorded in inspect/known-product-issues.md, not treated as test bug).

anomalies.title: Business failure uses Fail() returning code=4000 with HTTP 200
anomalies.evidence: app/api/v1/menus/menus.py:61 returns Fail(msg="Cannot delete a menu with child menus"). Fail is in app/schemas/base.py and yields {code: 4000, msg: ..., data: null} with HTTP 200.
anomalies.implication: API tests must assert on response.json()['code'] == 4000, NOT response.status_code == 400.

for_api_plan: Must specify exact request body, query params, and assertion form for each TC-MENU-* case
Must address CASE-FINDING-001 (TC-MENU-007 / TC-MENU-008 deferred response shape)
Must list as prerequisite: tests/api/helpers/menu_api.py + menu fixtures must exist before api-codegen
Must assert business code 4000 on Fail() responses (not HTTP 4xx)
for_e2e_plan: Must inspect web/src/views/system/menu/index.vue to determine exact selectors / role / button text BEFORE writing the plan
Must list as prerequisite: tests/e2e/scripts/menu_data_setup.py + cleanup_menus fixture must exist before e2e-codegen
Must NOT write Playwright code (selectors are E2E plan domain, not case domain)
Must rely on logged_in_page fixture; no new login flow
for_codegen_phases: BLOCKED until helpers/fixtures from ANOMALY-001 are created
Codegen-fixer or human author may produce these helpers as a prerequisite step; record in workflow-state.yaml under data_knowledge gate
